description_long: This is a rustic cabin with a steeply pitched gable roof covered in gray shingles, featuring a large open porch that wraps around the front and one side. The structure combines dark wooden beams and posts with light stone or stucco infill panels, giving it a traditional yet sturdy appearance. The front facade is dominated by a large triangular window section beneath the roof peak, allowing ample natural light into the main living area. A set of steps leads up to the porch, which is enclosed by a wooden railing. The side of the cabin displays a long row of vertical supports and a single horizontal window, while the rear is more enclosed with minimal fenestration. The overall design suggests a blend of alpine and rustic architectural influences, suitable for both urban parks and suburban neighborhoods.
description: A rustic cabin with a steep gable roof, large front porch, and a mix of dark wood and light stone walls. Prominent triangular windows and wooden railings enhance its traditional, inviting look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large triangular window, main entrance steps, and expansive porch with wooden railings.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long porch, vertical wooden supports, and a single horizontal window under the roof.
description_view_2: Rear corner view displaying the solid stone wall, minimal windows, and the continuation of the porch along the side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a mostly solid wall, vertical supports, and a partial view of the porch and railing.
attribute_roof_type: steep gable roof with gray shingles and a single rectangular dormer vent
attribute_window_arrangement: Large triangular window cluster on the front facade, single horizontal window on each side, asymmetrical distribution with emphasis on the front
attribute_door_placement: Single main door centered on the front facade, accessed via steps from the porch
